all.en: Thank you for choosing The Copper Lantern for your upcoming dining experience.
all.zh: 感謝您選擇 The Copper Lantern 作為您即將到訪的用餐地點。

all.en: This email confirms your reservation has been successfully received.
all.zh: 本封郵件確認您的訂位已成功受理。

all.en: Your booking is scheduled for Friday, May 22, at 7:30 in the evening.
all.zh: 您的訂位時間為五月二十二日（週五）晚間七點三十分。

all.en: We have reserved a table for six guests on our upper terrace level.
all.zh: 我們已為您六位賓客在二樓露台保留座位。

all.en: The terrace offers a panoramic view of the harbor and city skyline.
all.zh: 露台可俯瞰港灣與城市天際線的全景。

all.en: Your reservation is recorded under the name of Ms. Patricia Long.
all.zh: 您的訂位以 Patricia Long 女士的名義登記。

all.en: The confirmation number is CL-2026-04578 for your reference.
all.zh: 您的訂位確認編號為 CL-2026-04578，請保存以供參考。

all.en: Our chef will be featuring a seasonal tasting menu that evening.
all.zh: 當晚主廚將推出季節品嚐套餐。

all.en: The menu highlights locally sourced seafood and spring vegetables.
all.zh: 菜單以在地海鮮與春季蔬菜為主打。

all.en: Vegetarian and gluten-free options are available upon request.
all.zh: 如有需要，可提供素食與無麩質選項。

all.en: Please inform us in advance of any food allergies among your party.
all.zh: 若您的同行成員有任何食物過敏，請提前告知我們。

all.en: We recommend arriving 10 minutes early to enjoy a welcome drink.
all.zh: 建議提前十分鐘抵達，可享用迎賓飲品。

all.en: Our dress code is smart casual; gentlemen are kindly asked to wear jackets.
all.zh: 本店服裝規定為輕便正式，男士請著外套。

all.en: Complimentary valet parking is available at the main entrance.
all.zh: 正門入口提供免費代客泊車服務。

all.en: Public parking lots are also located within a short walking distance.
all.zh: 公共停車場亦位於步行可達距離。

all.en: If you are celebrating a special occasion, please let our staff know.
all.zh: 若您是為特別場合慶祝，歡迎告知我們的服務人員。

all.en: We are happy to prepare a personalized dessert or floral arrangement.
all.zh: 我們樂意為您準備客製化甜點或花藝佈置。

all.en: Please note that tables are held for 15 minutes past the reserved time.
all.zh: 請留意，訂位時間後座位將保留 15 分鐘。

all.en: After this period, the reservation may be released to other guests.
all.zh: 逾時後，訂位可能讓予其他客人。

all.en: Should your plans change, kindly notify us at least 24 hours in advance.
all.zh: 若您的行程有變，請至少提前 24 小時告知我們。

all.en: Cancellations can be made by phone or through our online booking portal.
all.zh: 取消訂位可透過電話或我們的線上訂位系統辦理。

all.en: For groups larger than ten, please contact our events coordinator.
all.zh: 十人以上的團體訂位，請聯繫我們的活動專員。

all.en: We look forward to welcoming you and your guests on Friday evening.
all.zh: 我們期待週五晚間迎接您與您的賓客。

all.en: Warm regards, the reservations team at The Copper Lantern.
all.zh: The Copper Lantern 訂位團隊敬上。

all.en: Our sommelier has curated a special wine pairing flight to accompany the tasting menu.
all.zh: 本店侍酒師特別搭配品嚐套餐挑選了一組精選佐餐酒單。

all.en: Live acoustic music will be performed on the terrace from eight until ten in the evening.
all.zh: 晚間八點至十點，露台將有現場原音樂演出。

all.en: A private dining room may be reserved for additional fee should your plans expand.
all.zh: 如您的計畫有所調整，亦可加價預訂私人包廂。

all.en: Photographs of our terrace setting are available on the gallery page of our website.
all.zh: 本店網站的相片集頁面有露台環境的照片可供參考。

all.en: We accept all major credit cards as well as contactless mobile payment options.
all.zh: 本店接受所有主要信用卡及感應式行動支付。

all.en: A service charge of fifteen percent will be added automatically to your final bill.
all.zh: 結帳金額將自動加收百分之十五的服務費。

all.en: Children are welcome, and our junior menu features approachable seasonal favorites.
all.zh: 我們歡迎兒童光臨，並提供以當季食材製作的兒童菜單。

all.en: Our pastry chef can prepare a custom celebration cake with three days advance notice.
all.zh: 若您於三日前預訂，我們的甜點主廚可為您製作客製化慶祝蛋糕。

all.en: Gift certificates for future visits are available for purchase at the host station tonight.
all.zh: 今晚於接待櫃台亦可購買日後造訪使用的禮券。

all.en: We sincerely appreciate your reservation and look forward to creating a memorable evening.
all.zh: 我們由衷感謝您的訂位，期待為您打造難忘的夜晚。

all.en: Our seasonal tasting menu rotates every six weeks to highlight the freshest ingredients available.
all.zh: 我們的季節品嚐套餐每六週更新一次，以呈現最新鮮的食材。

all.en: Diners may request a behind-the-scenes kitchen tour led by our executive chef on quieter evenings.
all.zh: 於較不繁忙的晚間，賓客可請主廚親自帶領後場廚房導覽。

all.en: We collaborate closely with regional farmers to source organic produce of the highest quality.
all.zh: 我們與在地農戶緊密合作，採購最高品質的有機農產品。

all.en: Our cocktail program features signature creations inspired by local botanicals and historic city landmarks.
all.zh: 本店的雞尾酒主打以在地植物與城市歷史地標為靈感的招牌調酒。

all.en: Corporate clients may inquire about hosting private banquets for up to forty seated guests.
all.zh: 企業客戶可洽詢舉辦最多容納四十位賓客的私人宴會。

all.en: Our loyalty program rewards regular guests with exclusive tasting events and chef collaboration dinners.
all.zh: 本店常客忠誠方案提供獨家品酒活動及主廚聯名晚宴等獎勵。

all.en: Reservation reminders will be sent to your mobile device twenty-four hours before your scheduled dining time.
all.zh: 訂位提醒將於用餐時間二十四小時前發送至您的行動裝置。

all.en: Should weather be unfavorable, indoor seating arrangements will be confirmed two hours before arrival.
all.zh: 若天候不佳，將於您抵達前兩小時確認室內座位安排。

all.en: We donate a portion of monthly proceeds to local charities supporting culinary education for young chefs.
all.zh: 我們每月將部分營收捐贈給支持年輕廚師烹飪教育的在地慈善機構。

all.en: Thank you for selecting our establishment, and please share any final preferences with our host team.
all.zh: 感謝您選擇本店，如有任何最後需求，請隨時告知接待團隊。

all.en: My husband is taking me there for our anniversary, and I have been planning my outfit for two weeks.
all.zh: 我先生要帶我去那邊慶祝結婚紀念日，我已經為穿什麼衣服煩惱兩週了。

all.en: Honestly, I always feel a little awkward when the waiter pulls out my chair, but it does feel special.
all.zh: 老實說每次服務生幫我拉椅子我都有點不自在，但確實會覺得自己被當成貴賓。

all.en: Last time my friend ordered the tasting menu and could not eat dinner the next day from being so full.
all.zh: 上次我朋友點了品嚐套餐，飽到隔天根本沒辦法再吃晚餐。

all.en: Have you ever shown up early to a fancy restaurant only to find your table is not ready yet?
all.zh: 你有沒有試過提早抵達高級餐廳，結果發現位子根本還沒準備好？

all.en: My boss took our whole team there last month, and we still talk about that chocolate dessert weekly.
all.zh: 我老闆上個月帶我們全組去那邊吃飯，那道巧克力甜點到現在每週還會被提起。

all.en: I usually skip the wine pairing since I have to drive home, but my wife really enjoyed it last time.
all.zh: 我通常不參加佐餐酒搭配，因為要開車回家，但上次我太太喝得很開心。

all.en: The dress code made me dig out a jacket I had not worn since my brother's graduation ceremony.
all.zh: 他們的服裝規定害我翻出一件從我弟畢業典禮後就沒穿過的外套。

all.en: I always tell the host it is my birthday, even when it is just a regular Wednesday in March.
all.zh: 我每次都會跟接待人員說今天是我生日，即使只是三月某個平凡的禮拜三。

all.en: My dad insisted on tipping in cash because he says the staff actually appreciate it more that way.
all.zh: 我爸堅持用現金給小費，他說服務人員真的比較喜歡這種方式。

all.en: Just remember to confirm the reservation by phone, since email confirmations sometimes get lost in spam folders.
all.zh: 記得用電話再確認一次訂位，因為電子郵件確認信有時會跑到垃圾信件夾。
